name: Ivory Palace
description: Stroll through the marble halls. Crisp ivory tones paired with royal gold.

ai_paste.title: Royal Decree
ai_paste.description: Summon the words to the hall

css: body { background-color: #fcfaf5; background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,%3Csvg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%3E%3Cfilter id="noise"%3E%3CfeTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.015" numOctaves="4" stitchTiles="stitch"/%3E%3CfeColorMatrix type="matrix" values="0 0 0 0 0.8, 0 0 0 0 0.7, 0 0 0 0 0.5, 0 0 0 0.12 0" /%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width="100%25" height="100%25" filter="url(%23noise)"/%3E%3C/svg%3E'); background-attachment: fixed; } .card, .panel, .surface { backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 69, 0.3) !important; position: relative; } .card::before, .panel::before, .surface::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 4px; left: 4px; right: 4px; bottom: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 69, 0.15); pointer-events: none; } .header { backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(196, 154, 69, 0.4) !important; } .sidebar { backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-right: 2px solid rgba(196, 154, 69, 0.3) !important; } input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important; } .btn-primary { color: #a67c00 !important; border-color: #a67c00 !important; } .btn-primary:hover { background-color: #a67c00 !important; color: #ffffff !important; } .bg-theme-surface, .card { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(var(--color-bg) / var(--color-bg-alpha, 1)), 0 0 0 3px rgb(var(--color-primary) / var(--color-primary-alpha, 1)), 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.06) !important; }
